introSection: Sounding Roller Coaster (Chinese: 探空过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Double Stream Park in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Sounding Roller Coaster opened in late-2012, a bit after the park.

By 2017, the coaster was reportedly abandoned.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It is a Sounding Roller Coaster by Zhejiang Juma Entertainment.

fullText:
Sounding Roller Coaster (Chinese: 探空过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Double Stream Park in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China.

Sounding Roller Coaster opened in late-2012, a bit after the park.

By 2017, the coaster was reportedly abandoned.

It is a Sounding Roller Coaster by Zhejiang Juma Entertainment.
